description: Context-sensitive: inside an existing workflow build, adding a classifier step should stay workflow-anchored.

priorConversation.text: We're building a workflow together: it triggers when a message arrives in our support inbox and currently just appends the message to a Google Sheet.
Noted — the workflow triggers on new support-inbox messages and appends each one to the sheet.

conversation.text: Add a step that classifies the incoming message.

processExpectations: The agent explains that classifying the incoming message is a bounded LLM step that can be added directly to the existing workflow.
The agent treats the request as extending the current workflow with a bounded LLM classification step rather than proposing a new agent.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
